NoResponse.description: Response object returned when no content is available.

Response Code.description: HTTP response code and message indicating no content.

v3-chat.description: Represents a chat object with comprehensive details including metadata, participants, and message information.

chat_type.description: Type of chat: channel, bot, entity_chat, direct_message, group_chat, crossproduct_custom_chat, thread, or unknown.

participant_count.description: Number of participants in the chat.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the chat was created (ISO 8601 format).

last_modified_time.description: Timestamp when the chat was last active or modified (ISO 8601 format).

pinned.description: Whether the chat is pinned by the current user.

removed.description: Whether the current user has been removed from this chat.

creator.description: Details of the user who created the chat.

last_message_info.description: Summary of the last message in the chat, if available.

unread_time.description: Timestamp of the first unread message, if any.

unread_message_count.description: Number of unread messages in the chat.

previous_titles.description: Historical chat names, if the chat has been renamed.

thread_message_id.description: ID of the thread head message. Present only for thread chats.

parent_chat_id.description: Chat ID of the parent. Present only for thread chats.

v3-create-chat-request.description:
For direct chat, send `chat_type: direct_message` with `user_id`.
For group chat, send `chat_type: group_chat` with `user_ids` and `title`.

chat_type.description:
Type of chat to create. Allowed values:
  • direct_message: A one-to-one chat with another user.
  • group_chat: A chat with multiple users, requires a title.

user_id.description:
Applicable for the direct_message chat type.
User ID of the other participant for direct messages.

user_ids.description:
Applicable for the group_chat chat type.
List of user IDs to include in the group chat. Must include at least 1 user and can include up to 50 users.

title.description:
Applicable for the group_chat chat type.
Title of the group chat. Required when creating a group chat.

v3-bulk-chat-update-request.description:
Supports two payload modes, selected by the operation field:
  • Mark as read (read_status_update): Set operation to read_status_update, read_status to read, and provide a chats array with each chat's chat_id and last_message_id. Returns 200 OK.
  • Clear unread (clear_unread): Set operation to clear_unread and provide a chat_ids array. Returns 204 No Content.

operation.description:
The bulk operation to perform on the specified chats.
Allowed values:
  • read_status_update: Marks the specified chats as read up to the given last_message_id. Requires read_status and chats fields.
  • clear_unread: Clears the unread message count or status to zero for the specified chats. Requires chat_ids field.

read_status.description:
The read status to apply to the specified chats.
Applicable for the read_status_update operation only.
Allowed value:
read - Marks the specified chats as read.

chats.description:
List of chats to mark as read. Applicable for the read_status_update operation only.
Maximum of 100 chats per request.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier of the chat to mark as read.

last_message_id.description: The message ID up to which the chat should be marked as read. All messages up to and including this message will be marked read.

chat_ids.description:
List of chat IDs for which to clear the unread count. Applicable for the clear_unread operation only.
Chats that do not have any unread entries will be skipped without error.
Maximum items: 100 chat IDs.

action.description:
The typing activity to send to the chat.
Allowed values:
  • typing: Indicates that the user is currently typing a message.
  • text_entered: Indicates that the user has entered text but has not yet sent the message.
  • text_cleared: Indicates that the user has cleared the entered text.

message_id.description: The ID of the message from which to fork the chat. The new chat will include messages starting from this message.

user_ids.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs to include in the forked chat. Example: 55743307,55622727

include_participants.description: Whether to include all participants from the original chat in the forked chat. If set to true, the user_ids field will be ignored and all participants will be included.

title.description: Title of the forked chat. Required when creating a forked chat.

user_ids.description: List of user IDs to add to the chat. Must include at least 1 user and can include up to 100 users.

no-response.description: Response object returned when no content is available.

Response Code.description: HTTP response code and message indicating no content.

get-chats-response.description: Response object containing details of a chat or direct message.

name.description: Display name of the chat or participant.

creation_time.description: Timestamp when the chat was created.

creator_id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the chat.

last_modified_time.description: Timestamp when the chat was last modified.

removed.description: Indicates whether the chat has been removed.

recipients_summary.description: List of participants in the chat with basic user details.

chat_type.description: Type of the chat, either a group chat (`chat`) or a direct message (`dm`).

chat_id.description: Unique identifier of the chat instance.

pinned.description: Indicates if the chat is pinned by the user.

participant_count.description: Number of participants in the chat.

UserSummary.description: Basic details of a user in the chat.

LastMessageInfo.description: Information about the most recent message in the chat.

sender_id.description: Unique identifier of the message sender.

message_type.description: Type of the message (e.g., text, image, file).

time.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

sender_name.description: Display name of the message sender.

MessageStyles.description: Style attributes applied to a message.

highlight.description: Indicates if the message should be visually highlighted.

BotInfo.description: Information about a bot associated with a message.

image_url.description: URL of the bot's display image.

retrieve-chat-members.description: Response object containing members of a chat.

members.description: List of members in the chat with detailed user information.

Members.description: Detailed information about a chat member.

pin-a-message-request.description: Request body parameters for pinning a message in a chat.

id.description: Unique identifier (msguid) of the message to be pinned.

expiry_time.description: Expiry time in milliseconds for the pinned message.

notify.description: Indicates whether pinning the message should notify all participants.

pin-a-message-response.description: Response object containing details of a pinned message.

expiry_time.description: Expiry time set for the pinned message in milliseconds. `-1` indicates no expiry.

creator.description: Information about the user who pinned the message.

id.description: Unique identifier of the message creator.

sender.description: Unique identifier of the original message sender.

lmsgtime.description: Timestamp when the message was last modified.

time.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

dname.description: Display name of the original message sender.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the message was pinned (in ms).

last_modified_time.description: Timestamp when the pinned message was last modified (in ms).

chat_id.description: Unique identifier of the chat where the message was pinned.

get-pinnedmessage-response.description: Response object containing details of an existing pinned message.

type.description: Type of the response object, usually `stickymessage`.

expiry_time.description: Expiry time for the pinned message in milliseconds. `-1` indicates no expiry.

creator.description: Information about the user who pinned the message.

message.description: Content details of the pinned message.

sender.description: Unique identifier of the original message sender.

lmsgtime.description: Timestamp when the message was last modified.

time.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

dname.description: Display name of the original message sender.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the message was pinned (in ms).

last_modified_time.description: Timestamp when the pinned message was last modified (in ms).

chat_id.description: Unique identifier of the chat where the message was pinned.
